description: Aggregated accuracy tracking across all prediction tiers. Updated after each prediction is scored. L1 = overall counts, L2 = RCA patterns, L3 = trend over time + factor performance.

all_time.note: May 12 EOD: 5 predictions scored — P003 WRONG (NIFTY 22000-22200 never reached), P017 WRONG (MRPL 200-210 unreachable), P039 WRONG (NIFTY IT underperformance window expired), P041 WRONG (NIFTY 24300-24600 vs actual 23379.55), P043 ABOVE_RANGE (SETFGOLD 128.29 vs 122-127 target). Total scored 35/45, accuracy 22.9%. Common RCA pattern: WEEKEND_REGIME_REVERSAL_PUNCTURES_THESIS (FORECAST_PAT005 reversed across May 10-11 weekend).

L2_rca_log.root_cause_summary: Geopolitical binary resolution (ceasefire deal) overrode technical setup. SWIGGY's bearish technical thesis was overwhelmed by regime shift from DEADLINE_EVE_BINARY to DE-ESCALATION_REAL.
L2_rca_log.missing_signal: FORECAST_PAT003 — geopolitical binary underweighting. Deal scenario was assigned 20% probability, materialized at 100%.
L2_rca_log.factor_gap: No reversal trigger framework for 3-outcome geopolitical binaries
L2_rca_log.lesson: For predictions made ahead of geopolitical binary events with 3+ outcomes, ALWAYS model reversal triggers. 'If deal → +2-4% Nifty, tech/consumer names bounce regardless of individual thesis.'

L2_rca_log.root_cause_summary: Defense sector duration premium thesis (M012) not in framework. 2-week ceasefire is OPTIMAL for defense stocks — extended tension without immediate peace = maximum war premium duration.
L2_rca_log.missing_signal: M012_DEFENSE_SECTOR_DURATION_PREMIUM — war premium peaks at 2-6 week managed tension, not immediate strikes or instant peace.
L2_rca_log.factor_gap: Framework lacked duration-modeling for defense stocks in ceasefire scenarios
L2_rca_log.lesson: Before making bearish defense predictions, check: what is the duration of the tension scenario? 2-6 week managed tension = hold or add defense. Instant peace = sell defense. Acute escalation = defense spikes but reverses quickly.

L2_rca_log.root_cause_summary: Ceasefire fragility underestimated. April 8 ceasefire failed within 3 days (Islamabad talks April 11). War premium reversed direction.
L2_rca_log.missing_signal: FORECAST_PAT004 (Ceasefire Stability Precondition) — need 3+ day stability before making bearish safe-haven calls.
L2_rca_log.factor_gap: No ceasefire hold probability decay model in framework
L2_rca_log.lesson: Wait 3+ trading days before bearish safe-haven calls on ceasefire. Model ceasefire failure probability at 40-60% for first 72 hours.

L2_rca_log.root_cause_summary: 2nd MACRO_REGIME_OVERRIDE for IT. M013 at 2 occurrences — candidate for promotion.
L2_rca_log.factor_gap: Auto-cap IT confidence at 2★ during blockade
L2_rca_log.lesson: IT predictions fail during active geopolitical crises regardless of earnings quality. 2 confirmations.

L2_rca_log.root_cause_summary: MACRO_REGIME_OVERRIDE (3rd occurrence). IT sector weakness + sell-on-news persistence. TCS +0.18% on Nifty +0.65% day.
L2_rca_log.lesson: Halt TCS short-horizon reversion calls until IT sector regime resets.

L2_rca_log.root_cause_summary: DIPLOMATIC_RESTART_NOT_ANTICIPATED (2nd occurrence). Gold bid collapsed as Trump reversed stance on Iran talks. Brent -6% from peak. SETFGOLD ₹128.69 vs ₹130-134 target.
L2_rca_log.lesson: Safe-haven thesis after talks failure must auto-invalidate within 48h if diplomatic reversal signal emerges.

L2_rca_log.root_cause_summary: Defense stock non-linear breakout on regime change. Target range 1050-1100 was correct directionally but too conservative for ceasefire-collapse acceleration.
L2_rca_log.missing_signal: REGIME_BREAKOUT_MULTIPLIER — in GEOPOLITICAL_RISK_ELEVATED_CEASEFIRE_COLLAPSE, defense stocks can exceed 'fundamental' war-premium levels by 10-20% on momentum
L2_rca_log.factor_gap: No defense range multiplier for regime-breakout scenarios vs fragile-ceasefire scenarios
L2_rca_log.lesson: In ceasefire collapse (vs fragile ceasefire), defense targets should add +15-20% buffer. P025 directional thesis was right but range too conservative. Count: 1 occurrence (observe).

L2_rca_log.note: Bearish ≤260 broken by Apr 8 ceasefire Brent-crash consumer rally.
Defense war-premium extended through entire 4W horizon.
IT cascade + ceasefire fraying — dual adverse binary, multiplicative impact.

L2_rca_log.root_cause_summary: Bullish 24,600-25,000 thesis built on ceasefire-extends + IT-sector-supports assumptions. Both broke simultaneously: (1) ceasefire 'extended' but Iran refused next-round talks Apr 22; (2) HCLTECH guidance shock Apr 21 post-market triggered IT cascade (INFY -6.93%, HCLTECH -4.02% Apr 24). Multiplicative downside via dual binary correlation.
L2_rca_log.missing_signal: MULTI_BINARY_CORRELATION — when 2+ independent binary events (earnings + geopolitical) resolve adversely within 5 sessions, Nifty impact is multiplicative (not additive) due to regime-confidence collapse.
L2_rca_log.factor_gap: Framework lacks multi-binary correlation handler; individual probabilities were known but combined impact undersized
L2_rca_log.lesson: When 2+ binary events resolve in same 5-session window AND both lean adverse, downgrade index target by 1.5x base case shock. P027 baseline assumed +1.5-2.5% Nifty rally on extension; actual: -2.05% on dual adverse (-3.5pp delta vs base case).

L2_rca_log.root_cause_summary: Bearish ≤260 broken by Apr 8 ceasefire Brent-crash consumer rally. Stock found support 280-285 zone. Same pattern as P007 — geopolitical regime shift overrode technical setup.
L2_rca_log.missing_signal: CONSUMER_DISC_BRENT_INVERSE — consumer discretionary benefits non-linearly from Brent decline >5% over 2W (real-wage relief signal).
L2_rca_log.factor_gap: No consumer-disc-Brent inverse modeling; treats consumer disc as Brent-neutral
L2_rca_log.lesson: Q-commerce/consumer discretionary names get +40% breakout probability when Brent falls >5% over 2W. Bearish thesis on these names requires Brent >$100 sustained for 2+ weeks. 1 occurrence (observe).

L2_rca_log.root_cause_summary: 3rd confirmation of M012 (Defense Sector Duration Premium). Defense premium extended through entire 4W horizon as: (1) ceasefire created managed-tension regime, (2) re-escalation late April amplified rather than unwound. Bearish target 850-900 was 25-32% below actual close 1123.75.
L2_rca_log.missing_signal: M012 already promoted at v2 (April 8) but only had 2 occurrences; 3rd confirmation should bump confidence/strength
L2_rca_log.factor_gap: M012 was applied to NEW predictions but legacy predictions (P004) generated pre-promotion did not have M012 applied
L2_rca_log.lesson: When framework patterns are promoted, audit ALL open legacy predictions and downgrade confidence to 1★ on those that conflict with new pattern. P004 should have been auto-invalidated April 8 when M012 promoted.

L2_rca_log.root_cause_summary: Range-consolidation thesis directionally right (gold corrected from ₹128.69 to ₹127.73) but haven bid extended fractionally past forecast window due to Apr 23-24 Israel-Iran escalation fear. Closed 0.57% above range ceiling.
L2_rca_log.missing_signal: HAVEN_PREMIUM_DURATION_TAIL — haven bids persist 2-5 sessions past trigger-event resolution due to positioning unwind lag.
L2_rca_log.factor_gap: Forecast window was 7D; tail extended to 9-10D
L2_rca_log.lesson: For gold/SETFGOLD bearish range calls, extend horizon by +2-3 sessions past expected ceasefire/diplomatic event to allow positioning unwind. P029 thesis would have RIGHT at 10D (₹125-127 likely by Apr 30). 1 occurrence (observe).

L2_rca_log.win_pattern: OVERSOLD_BOUNCE_PROBABILITY_UPGRADE candidate — 4-day cumulative -2.78% + DII activation + Brent cooling trifecta drove base-case CONTINUATION_BOUNCE (50% scenario) outcome. Recommend lifting baseline probability of bounce-day base case from ~50% to ~60% when this trifecta is present.
L2_rca_log.framework_value_added: Morning brief raised conviction 2 → 3 on early intraday tape (24,107 high, Brent cooling), correctly anticipating sustained recovery. Adaptive conviction adjustment vindicated.

L2_rca_log.root_cause_summary: 4th consecutive defense-bearish prediction failure. ASTRA MICRO at ₹1,125.2 vs ₹1,010-1,060 target — 6.1% above ceiling. M012 v5 fully operative: Brent 18 on Apr 30 opening (Trump blockade extension). No unwind conditions met. Stock is now institutional macro hedge asset at +100% gain.
L2_rca_log.missing_signal: DEFENSE_PREMIUM_PERSISTENCE — at extreme Brent levels (15+), defense stocks receive institutional macro-hedge bid on top of geopolitical premium. Standard M012 underestimates this compounding effect.
L2_rca_log.factor_gap: Framework correctly identifies M012 threshold but does not model the reinforcing effect of extreme Brent on defense premium magnitude
L2_rca_log.proposed_factor_name: Defense Premium Persistence at Extreme Brent
L2_rca_log.lesson: ASTRA MICRO above +80% gain is an institutional macro hedge. No tactical short prediction justified. M012 floor rises over time in sustained extreme regime.

L2_rca_log.root_cause_summary: 52pt near-miss (0.2% below range floor of 24,050). Nifty closed 23,997.55. Intraday high 24,019 — 31pts short of target floor. Brent spiked to 18.03 on Trump blockade extension, causing gap-down open that DII could not fully recover.
L2_rca_log.missing_signal: BRENT_EXTREME_RECOVERY_CAP — when Brent opens a session above 15, Nifty intraday recovery is structurally capped 50-100 pts below nearest resistance.
L2_rca_log.factor_gap: Nifty range floor was set at 24,050 without accounting for extreme Brent cap. Should have been 23,950-24,200.
L2_rca_log.lesson: When Brent is EXTREME (15+), reduce Nifty range floor by 50-100 pts vs standard mean-reversion forecast. Add explicit brent-extreme-range-adjustment to all Nifty forecasts.

L2_rca_log.root_cause_summary: BankNifty closed 54,863.35 — 1,637 pts (3%) below 56,500 target. Auto-invalidation triggered: broke 55,800. HDFC Bank Q4 beat insufficient to offset RBI ECL framework + Brent 18 risk-off + FII selling.
L2_rca_log.missing_signal: ECL_BANKING_STRUCTURAL_HEADWIND — RBI ECL provision framework creates systematic BankNifty underperformance vs Nifty. Unlike PSU infra DII support (mandate-driven), banking ECL is regulatory-driven.
L2_rca_log.factor_gap: Framework applies PSU_DII_FILTER broadly but does not distinguish PSU infra (mandate-buying works) from PSU banking (regulatory headwind overrides mandate)
L2_rca_log.proposed_factor_name: RBI ECL Framework BankNifty Structural Drag
L2_rca_log.lesson: BankNifty bullish calls require EXPLICIT catalyst to overcome ECL drag: (a) RBI ECL delay/reversal, OR (b) FII net buying 3+ sessions, OR (c) Brent <00 sustained. Without ALL conditions, cap BankNifty bullish predictions at 2★.

L2_rca_log.root_cause_summary: COCHINSHIP closed ₹1,773.80 (April 29) / est ₹1,740-1,775 (April 30) within ₹1,720-1,800 target. Direct causal link: geopolitical premium for defense shipbuilder. Stock gained +8.4% from entry.
L2_rca_log.win_pattern: DIRECT_CAUSAL_LINK_WINS — single direct causal link predictions: 5/5 = 100% accuracy (P008, P015, P019, P028, P033). Multi-factor predictions: ~1/21. The lesson is confirmed empirically across regime changes.
L2_rca_log.framework_value_added: M012 v5 framework correctly kept defense floor elevated through fragile-ceasefire. Applying single-causal-link lesson (from P019 RCA) to COCHINSHIP defense premium produced the 5th consecutive single-link win.

April 15: P015 RIGHT, P016 PARTIAL, P018 WRONG, P019 RIGHT, P020 WRONG. April 16: P024 WRONG. April 17: P022 WRONG, P023 WRONG. Framework v4: M013+FORECAST_PAT005+SELL_ON_EARNINGS_NEWS_IT promoted.
P030/P031/P032 WRONG, P033 CORRECT. Scored in first week — 4 predictions effective April 30. Cold streak partially broken.

last_4_scored.note: P030 WRONG, P031 WRONG, P032 WRONG, P033 CORRECT. 25% — improvement from 0% last week.

last_8_scored.note: P028 CORRECT + P033 CORRECT. 25% — two wins breaking 9-prediction cold streak.

L3_trend.improvement_signal: COLD_STREAK_PARTIALLY_BROKEN — P028 (Apr 28) + P033 (Apr 30) = 2 CORRECTs in 6 scored since cold streak nadir. Framework v6-v7 patterns showing early positive signal. Key: direct-causal-link predictions 5/5 (100%); everything else ~0%. Week ahead: P036/P038/P034/P039 all expected CORRECT (framework-aligned single-link calls) — if all hit, projected accuracy jumps to 30%.

key_failure_patterns.DIPLOMATIC_RESTART_SPEED: 3/5 wrong predictions (P022, P023, P024) failed because diplomatic restart after Islamabad failure was faster than model assumed. Now codified in FORECAST_PAT005.
key_failure_patterns.IT_MACRO_REGIME_OVERRIDE: 3 consecutive TCS predictions (P018, P021, P022) WRONG. M013 now promoted. No more short-horizon IT bullish calls during active geopolitical regimes.
key_failure_patterns.GOLD_REGIME_SENSITIVITY: 2/2 SETFGOLD predictions WRONG. Both failed due to rapid diplomatic shifts (one ceasefire fragility, one diplomatic restart). Low confidence (2*) on all future gold directional calls in volatile regimes.

what_works.DIRECT_BENEFICIARY_CALLS: P019 Adani Ports RIGHT (direct Hormuz beneficiary). P015 IndiGo RIGHT (direct ATF relief beneficiary). P008 Nifty RIGHT (clear DII-support thesis).
what_works.LESSON: Predictions that have a SINGLE, DIRECT causal link between catalyst and stock perform best. Complex multi-factor predictions with diplomatic/regime assumptions fail systematically in volatile geopolitical environments.

framework_evolution_log_update.changes: M012 occurrence count updated to 3 (P004 third confirmation). New OBSERVING: MULTI_BINARY_CORRELATION, HAVEN_PREMIUM_DURATION_TAIL, CONSUMER_DISC_BRENT_INVERSE, IT_CASCADE_OVERRIDES_MACRO. AUDIT_RULE added: legacy predictions auto-downgrade on framework promotion. New predictions P031-P035 added.

M001.name: Brent Crude
M001.accuracy_contribution: MISSED — April 8 ceasefire caused -17.5% Brent crash, overriding all crude-bearish theses. Note: M001 as a factor correctly identified risk, but the direction was wrong in WRONG predictions.
M001.note: Brent now $93.13. M001 regime has CHANGED — now crude-bullish for downstream (MRPL, airlines) rather than crude-bearish for these stocks.

M003.name: FII Flows
M003.accuracy_contribution: NEUTRAL — directionally correct on P008 (DII support held), mixed on P007 (FII flows less relevant when macro regime shifts).

T001.name: 52-Week Proximity
T001.accuracy_contribution: NEUTRAL — 52wk technical levels become irrelevant in macro regime shifts. Still valid for range-trading environments.

FORECAST_PAT003.name: Geopolitical Binary Underweighting
FORECAST_PAT003.accuracy_contribution: CRITICAL GAP — promoted to framework April 8. Must apply reversal triggers in all 3-outcome geopolitical binary scenarios.

M012.name: Defense Sector Duration Premium
M012.accuracy_contribution: CRITICAL GAP — promoted to framework April 8. 2-6 week managed tension = maximum defense premium. Must model ceasefire duration when analyzing defense stocks.

framework_evolution_log.description: Signal framework initialized with 9 macro, 9 sector, 6 technical factors
Added FORECAST_PAT003 (Geopolitical Binary Underweighting) and M012 (Defense Sector Duration Premium) to framework. Both promoted after 2 confirmed occurrences each.
framework_evolution_log.triggered_by: RCA001 (P007 WRONG) + RCA002 (P009 WRONG) — both caused by April 8 ceasefire regime shift
key_learnings: Geopolitical binaries with 3+ outcomes always have a best-case scenario that markets price faster than consensus
Defense stocks thrive in 2-6 week managed tension, not instant peace or acute escalation
RBI/central bank calendar check needed on binary event forecast days
Regime changes are binary, not incremental — a single diplomatic breakthrough can override 3 days of fear premium

framework_evolution_log.description: Added FORECAST_PAT004 (Ceasefire Stability Precondition). IT regime risk filter (M013) identified — 2 more occurrences needed for promotion.
framework_evolution_log.triggered_by: RCA004 (P020 SETFGOLD WRONG) — 2nd ceasefire fragility observation
key_learnings: Ceasefire stability requires 3+ day confirmation window before bearish safe-haven calls
IT stocks face macro regime override in BLOCKADE_ESCALATION — do not predict breakouts during active crises
Aviation benefits non-linearly from Brent decline (₹200-300 per $10 Brent drop for INDIGO)
Direct geopolitical beneficiaries (ADANI PORT/Hormuz) are more reliable than indirect (TCS/IT)

framework_evolution_log.description: PROMOTED: M013 (IT Regime Risk Filter), FORECAST_PAT005 (Diplomatic Restart Trigger), SELL_ON_EARNINGS_NEWS_IT. AMENDED: TALKS_FAILED_WAR_PREMIUM_RETURN — 1-2 day swing pattern only, not 7D+.
framework_evolution_log.triggered_by: RCA_P022 (TCS WRONG, 3rd IT MACRO_REGIME_OVERRIDE) + RCA_P023 (SETFGOLD WRONG, 2nd diplomatic restart underweighting)
key_learnings: Diplomatic restart after failed talks is faster than anticipated — FORECAST_PAT005 now active guard
IT sector systematically fails in active geopolitical regimes regardless of earnings quality — M013 cap enforced
Sell-on-news for large-cap IT is structural (5-10 sessions) not tactical
Best predictions have ONE direct causal link between catalyst and stock outcome

framework_evolution_log.description: M012 occurrence count updated to 3 (P004 confirmation). New OBSERVING patterns added: MULTI_BINARY_CORRELATION (1 occurrence P027), HAVEN_PREMIUM_DURATION_TAIL (1 occurrence P029), CONSUMER_DISC_BRENT_INVERSE (1 occurrence P001), IT_CASCADE_OVERRIDES_MACRO (1 occurrence Apr 24 session). New AUDIT_RULE: when framework pattern is promoted, downgrade legacy open predictions that conflict with the new pattern to 1★.
framework_evolution_log.triggered_by: Worst weekly accuracy (0/6 RIGHT including P025 ABOVE_RANGE) + 9-prediction cold streak. Multi-binary failure mode dominant.
key_learnings: MULTI-BINARY CORRELATION is the dominant failure mode — when 2+ binary events resolve adversely within 5 sessions, downgrade index targets by 1.5x base case shock
Legacy predictions need framework-promotion-audit (P004 should have been invalidated Apr 8 when M012 promoted)
Defense premium extends ~3-4 weeks even through fragile-ceasefire scenarios (M012 confirmed at 3 occurrences)
Haven premium has 2-5 session positioning-unwind tail — extend gold bearish horizons by +2-3 sessions
Consumer disc gets +40% breakout probability when Brent falls >5% over 2W — cap bearish consumer-disc calls during Brent declines
IT cascade (sector contagion) can override macro thesis — IT sector idiosyncratic shocks (HCLTECH guidance, INFY result) can drag Nifty independent of Brent direction

key_scoring_events: P030 ASTRA MICRO ₹1,010-1,060 check — EXPECTED WRONG (stock ~₹1,096-1,124, above range)
P031 NIFTY 24,050-24,300 check — EXPECTED RIGHT (Nifty closed 24,177, IN RANGE; May 1 holiday so Apr 30 is effective score date)
P032 BANKNIFTY >56,500 check — EXPECTED WRONG (BankNifty at 55,403, +2% needed in 1 day)
P033 COCHINSHIP ₹1,720-1,800 check — UNCERTAIN (Apr 28 close ₹1,695, needs +1.5%)
next_session_accuracy.note: P031 is the biggest swing factor — Nifty already at 24,177 (IN RANGE for 24,050-24,300). If Nifty holds above 24,050 on Apr 30 close, P031 scores CORRECT — would be the 2nd RIGHT prediction in 10 sessions and first index call RIGHT since P008 (very early in the framework).

weekly_review_2026_04_12.note: No predictions reached check_date during April 7-11 trading week. All scoring (P012, P013, P015, P016, P018, P019, P020, P021, P022) deferred to April 14-17 EOD runs.

Ceasefire technically still holding — Pakistan FM urging both sides to maintain

Coal India at ₹454 — P005 buffer increased to ₹24 above ₹430 target

weekly_review_2026_04_19.note: P022 TCS WRONG, P023 SETFGOLD WRONG. Accuracy dropped to 21.4%. Framework v4 promoted.
weekly_review_2026_04_19.regime_at_review: DIPLOMATIC_DEESCALATION_WITH_EXPIRY_RISK — ceasefire expiry Apr 21 binary pending.

weekly_review_2026_04_26.note: 6 predictions scored: 0 RIGHT, 1 PARTIAL, 5 WRONG (incl. 1 ABOVE_RANGE). Worst week so far. All-time accuracy now 15.0% (3 RIGHT / 20 scored). Cold streak persists.
weekly_review_2026_04_26.regime_evolution: Apr 20 (Mon): DIPLOMATIC_DEESCALATION_WITH_EXPIRY_RISK → Apr 21 (Tue): ceasefire VOTED to extend BUT Iran refused talks, Vance cancelled Islamabad → Apr 22-23: GEOPOLITICAL_RISK_ELEVATED_CEASEFIRE_FRAYING → Apr 24: GEOPOLITICAL_RISK_ELEVATED_OVERSOLD_WEEKEND_BINARY_PENDING.

HCLTECH Q4 (Apr 21 post-market) — -10% guidance shock; sector cascade ensued
Infosys Q4 (Apr 23) — sell-on-news (5th IT M013 confirmation pattern-wise)

FII selling 4 consecutive sessions (~₹3,254 cr Apr 24 alone)

Defense bid persistent: COCHINSHIP +4.51% Friday, ASTRA MICRO sustained ₹1,100+

weekly_review_2026_04_26.framework_update_v5: PROMOTED: DEFENSE_DURATION_PREMIUM (M012 confirmed_occurrences → 3, P007/P009/P004). NEW OBSERVING: MULTI_BINARY_CORRELATION (1 occurrence P027), HAVEN_PREMIUM_DURATION_TAIL (1 occurrence P029), CONSUMER_DISC_BRENT_INVERSE (1 occurrence P001), IT_CASCADE_OVERRIDES_MACRO (1 occurrence — Apr 24 session).
weekly_review_2026_04_26.key_lesson_of_week: MULTI-BINARY CORRELATION is the dominant failure mode this week. P027 Nifty bullish target (24,600-25,000) was undone by SIMULTANEOUS earnings shock (HCLTECH guidance) + geopolitical re-fraying (Vance cancellation). Individual probabilities were known; combined impact was multiplicative not additive. New rule: when 2+ binary events resolve adversely within 5 sessions, downgrade index targets by 1.5x base case shock.
weekly_review_2026_04_26.rolling_5_pred_accuracy: 0/5 = 0% (P022, P023, P024, P025-ABOVE_RANGE, P026 WRONG). Extended cold streak now 6 weeks, no RIGHT prediction since P019 ADANI PORT (Apr 15).

note: Accuracy 22.9% across 35 scored predictions. May 12: 5 new scorings, all bearish-reverse outcomes.

L2_rca.dominant_failure_mode: MULTI_BINARY_CORRELATION — 2+ adverse binary events within 5 sessions (HCLTECH guidance shock Apr 21 + Iran refused talks Apr 21-22) produced multiplicative rather than additive Nifty impact. P027 target (24,600-25,000) required BOTH ceasefire to hold AND IT sector stability; neither materialized.

L2_root_causes.description: Ceasefire appeared to extend Apr 21 but simultaneously Iran refused next-round talks. Vance cancellation was NOT a confirmed escalation signal at time of P027 prediction — classified as noise. In hindsight: ANY ceasefire extension that lacks bilateral agreement = fragile = GEOPOLITICAL_RISK_ELEVATED maintained.
L2_root_causes.fix_applied: TALKS_FAILED_WAR_PREMIUM_RETURN promoted to CONFIRMED pattern. Future fragile-ceasefire = maintain RISK_ELEVATED regime tag.

L2_root_causes.description: P025 ASTRA MICRO target 1050-1100 was ABOVE_RANGE (actual 1129.75). M012 v5 now explains: defense premium EXTENDS even through fragile-ceasefire. Original P025 range was too bearish on defense in managed-tension regime.
L2_root_causes.fix_applied: M012 STRENGTHENED — defense premium requires BOTH Brent <$92 AND Hormuz fully open 5+ days. P036 uses >₹1,050 floor rather than range, acknowledging defense durability.

L2_root_causes.description: P004 (ASTRA MICRO ₹850-900) was generated March 28 before ANY geopolitical framework existed. When M012 was promoted Apr 8, P004 should have been auto-invalidated. It wasn't. P004 scored WRONG Apr 25 — stock at ₹1,123 vs bearish ₹850-900 target. Legacy prediction staleness = systematic accuracy drag.
L2_root_causes.fix_applied: AUDIT_LEGACY_ON_PROMOTION meta-rule added. P014 already downgraded to 1★ this week as proactive application.

L2_root_causes.description: P029 SETFGOLD PARTIAL: target 123-127 was directionally right (gold correction after Brent cooling) but actual close was ₹127.73 (0.57% above ceiling). 7D window was 2-3 sessions too short for haven premium to fully unwind — HAVEN_PREMIUM_DURATION_TAIL pattern confirmed.
L2_root_causes.fix_applied: P034 uses 10D window (vs P029's 7D) and wider range (125-130). Future gold bearish horizons: 9-12D, not 7D.

L2_root_causes.description: P001 SWIGGY WRONG: Apr 8 Brent crash (-17.5% to $93) provided unexpected support at ₹280-285 zone. Without the Brent crash, P001 (≤₹260) would have been directionally correct. Pattern: consumer disc names have significant BRENT_INVERSE sensitivity — ₹5-15 Brent crash = material breakout probability increase.
L2_root_causes.fix_applied: CONSUMER_DISC_BRENT_INVERSE added to OBSERVING. P040 applies this in reverse (Brent $105 sustained = bearish consumer disc confirmed).

L3_trend_analysis.rolling_10_accuracy: 2/10 = 20% (P012 PARTIAL, P015 RIGHT vs 8 WRONG/PARTIAL in last 10 scored)
L3_trend_analysis.hypothesis: v6 framework (TALKS_FAILED promoted, SELL_ON_EARNINGS_NEWS_IT 5 occurrences, M012 strengthened) should improve accuracy in IT and defense calls starting this week. Key test: P028 HCLTECH (RIGHT expected Apr 28) + P036 ASTRA MICRO (M012 floor).
L3_trend_analysis.risk_of_continued_cold_streak: P031/P032/P033 (May 1) all require market recovery that current macro regime makes difficult. 40% probability all three score WRONG, extending cold streak to 12-13 predictions.

EARNINGS_SURPRISE_BEATS_MACRO_FEAR.description: Strong earnings beat from major index heavyweight can override EXTREME_ELEVATED crude macro fear, triggering 0.75%+ session reversal.
EARNINGS_SURPRISE_BEATS_MACRO_FEAR.triggered_by: Bajaj Finance Q4 FY26 — PAT +22-23% YoY vs feared provisions surge

PSU_DII_FILTER_CONFIRMED_2X.description: DII systematic infrastructure mandates create support floor for PSU rail-finance names (IRFC, IRCON) well above fundamental fair-value. Avoid bearish range calls.
PSU_DII_FILTER_CONFIRMED_2X.triggered_by: P026 WRONG + P010 WRONG (both IRFC bearish calls failed at ₹92-96 and ₹85-95 respectively)

BRENT_EXTREME_RECOVERY_CAP.description: When Brent opens a session above 15 (EXTREME zone), Nifty intraday recovery is structurally capped 50-100 pts below nearest resistance level. Reduce Nifty mean-reversion range floor by 50-100 pts in extreme Brent forecasts.
BRENT_EXTREME_RECOVERY_CAP.triggered_by: P031 WRONG — April 30 intraday high 24,019 vs 24,050 range floor (31pt gap). Brent opened at 18.03.

ECL_BANKING_STRUCTURAL_HEADWIND.description: RBI ECL provision framework creates systematic BankNifty underperformance. PSU_DII_FILTER support works for infra names but NOT for banking under regulatory headwinds. BankNifty bullish calls require explicit catalyst (ECL delay OR FII buying 3+ sessions OR Brent <00).
ECL_BANKING_STRUCTURAL_HEADWIND.triggered_by: P032 WRONG — BankNifty 54,863 vs >56,500 target. HDFC Bank Q4 beat insufficient to overcome ECL framework drag.

DEFENSE_PREMIUM_PERSISTENCE.description: At extreme Brent levels (15+), defense stocks receive institutional macro-hedge bid on top of geopolitical premium. ASTRA MICRO has failed to reach any bearish target in 4 consecutive predictions (P004, P009, P025, P030). At +100% gain from avg, stock is institutional macro hedge asset.
DEFENSE_PREMIUM_PERSISTENCE.triggered_by: P004 WRONG + P009 WRONG + P025 ABOVE_RANGE + P030 WRONG (4 consecutive defense bearish failures)
DEFENSE_PREMIUM_PERSISTENCE.note: Near-promotion: 4 occurrences. Recommend promotion when one more bearish defense prediction fails OR when a direct-link defense CORRECT is confirmed (P033 = first defense RIGHT).

weekly_review_2026_05_03.framework_update_v7: NEW OBSERVING: BRENT_EXTREME_RECOVERY_CAP (P031 — 1 occurrence), ECL_BANKING_STRUCTURAL_HEADWIND (P032 — 1 occurrence), DEFENSE_PREMIUM_PERSISTENCE (P030 — 4th confirmation). DIRECT_CAUSAL_LINK_WINS confirmed 5/5. PSU_DII_FILTER remains at 2 occurrences (3 needed for promotion). FORECAST_PAT005 actively fired this weekend.
weekly_review_2026_05_03.key_lesson_of_week: DIRECT_CAUSAL_LINK is the single most reliable prediction methodology: 5/5 = 100%. All 5 CORRECT predictions had exactly one direct causal link between catalyst and outcome. The inverse is equally confirmed: multi-factor predictions with regime assumptions fail systematically. Build every new prediction around a single, clearly articulable causal chain.

rolling_5.note: Sessions May 5 CORRECT, May 6 WRONG, May 7 PARTIAL, May 8 WRONG, May 11 PARTIAL. Rolling 5: 1 CORRECT, 2 PARTIAL, 2 WRONG. Strict accuracy 20%; directional accuracy (incl. partial) 60%. Quality has deteriorated as fragile-ceasefire regime increases magnitude shocks — direction calls hold up but range/magnitude calls miss.
